allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items=data.get\(''''items'''',[]\); print\(f''''Items: {len\(items\)}''''\); [print\(f''''{i[""get\(""url"",""""\)} | {item.get\(""id"",""""\)}''''\) for item in items[:10]]")

Bash(node -e "const {instagram} = require\(''instagram-scraper-api''\); instagram.user\(''centelhaprod''\).then\(d => { console.log\(JSON.stringify\({posts: d.posts?.slice\(0,6\).map\(p => \({shortcode: p.shortcode, photo: p.photo, isVideo: p.isVideo}\)\)}\)\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(''ERROR:'', e.message\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const f = require\(''cross-fetch''\); f.default\(''https://www.instagram.com/centelhaprod/?__a=1&__d=dis''\).then\(r => r.text\(\)\).then\(t => { try { const j = JSON.parse\(t\); const items = j?.graphql?.user?.edge_owner_to_timeline_media?.edges; console.log\(items?.length || 0, ''posts found''\); if\(items?.length\) console.log\(JSON.stringify\(items.slice\(0,3\).map\(i => \({shortcode: i.node.shortcode, photo: i.node.display_url, isVideo: i.node.is_video}\)\)\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''Not JSON, length:'', t.length\); } }\).catch\(e => console.error\(''ERROR:'', e.message\)\);")
